## 版本 1
We just released Clex-AI-Ultra Core v0.1.0-public-alpha — an open-source polyglot core toolkit for AI-assisted development.

✅ Specs (4 JSON Schema)
✅ Python MVP (workflow orchestration)
⚠️ Node.js/Rust/Go CLI Skeletons (arch in place, work in progress)

Repo: https://github.com/1lvinx/Clex-AI-Ultra-Core

## 版本 2
Breaking the silence: Clex-AI-Ultra Core is now public alpha.

Architecture: Python (orchestration) + Node.js (CLI) + Rust (validation) + Go (concurrency)

Status: Python MVP done, others are skeleton layer — ready for testing/feedback, not production.

Check it out → https://github.com/1lvinx/Clex-AI-Ultra-Core

#Python #Rust #Go #Nodejs #OpenSource

## 版本 3
Clex-AI-Ultra Core v0.1.0-public-alpha is live 🔊

What's inside:
- 4 cross-lang JSON schemas
- Python runtime (workflow orchestration + scheduler)
- Node.js/Rust/Go CLI/runtime skeletons (structure done, implementation in progress)

Highlights:
- Cross-language JSON-RPC protocol
- Permission control framework
- Agent coordination design

Repo: https://github.com/1lvinx/Clex-AI-Ultra-Core
